74717901.name: LIFE SMILE Granite Stone 29-Piece Cookware Set
74717901.shortDescriptionHtml: LIFE SMILE Granite Stone 29-Piece Cookware Set
74717901.descriptionHtml:
The set includes (29 Pieces):

  • Deep pots: 16 cm (1.5L), 20 cm (2.3L), 24 cm (4.1L), 28 cm (6.9L), 32 cm (9.5L), 36 cm (13L), 40 cm (18L)
  • Detachable handle frying pan: 24 cm (1.6L)
  • Shallow pots: 28 cm (3.9L) and 32 cm (5.8L)
  • Deep double-sided grill pan: 30 cm
  • 7 additional cooking accessories
